text:
This is an OpenPGP/MIME signed message (RFC 4880 and 3156)

 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 Hi, ccn,
 
 I'm afraid I can't get your patch to apply cleanly -- all the changes to
 files/patch-mytop end up in the reject pile.
 
 Could you veryfy it applies cleanly on an up-to-date ports tree and then
 try e-mailing it directly to me please?  Or just send the whole
 patch-mytop file
 
 	Cheers,
 
 	Matthew
 
 --=20
 Dr Matthew J Seaman MA, D.Phil.
 PGP: http://www.infracaninophile.co.uk/pgpkey
